---
name: 🎮 New Game Proposal
about: Propose adding a new game to ZynoArena
title: "[GAME] "
labels: game, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎮 Game Name
What is the name of the game?

## 📝 Game Description
Briefly describe the game, its rules, and what makes it fun.

## 🧠 AI Opponent?
- [ ] Yes — describe the AI strategy idea
- [ ] No — multiplayer only
- [ ] Both

## 🛠️ Implementation Plan
How would you implement this?
- Game engine: Phaser / Pure Canvas / DOM?
- Estimated complexity: Low / Medium / High
- Key challenges:

## 📱 Platform Support
- [ ] Desktop
- [ ] Mobile (responsive)
- [ ] Both

## 🎨 Design Notes
Any specific UI/design ideas? Should it follow the glassmorphism dark theme?

## 🔗 References
Links to similar implementations, game rule sources, or design inspiration.

## 👷 Are you willing to implement it?
- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] I can help but need guidance
- [ ] Just proposing — looking for someone to build it
